metadata.description: P4 — the prompty / prompter / pioneer / puppeteer meta-prompting framework; ships the Roboto four-lens reasoning instance as an installable plugin.

plugins.name: mister
plugins.description: Roboto / "The Init Elegance" — the four-lens reasoning instance of the P4 framework: identity, rubric, vlds, templates, bias-patterns, isomorphic-operations, sjc-indexer, activation, and persistence skills plus a roboto subagent.

plugins.name: vlds
plugins.description: VLDS — the P4 framework's epistemic discipline as a standalone, runtime dashboard of two instruments. The gate routes every load-bearing claim through VERIFIABLE → VERIFIED → CONFIRMED / PENDING / HEDGED — verify before you assert, state what you can't verify with its uncertainty attached. The guide loop disciplines the need behind the claim, configuring and recording the model's behavior as the user steers it. Portable; no dependency on the roboto instance.
